experiment: C2 — relation-inclusive keying (root-cause probe) + C2b depth map
method: compute_ks same-relation key collinearity (pure measurement, no edits/cov)

C2_phase0_relation_keying.verdict: PRUNED — relation-inclusive keying makes same-relation keys MORE collinear (collapses onto shared relation direction). Corpus workaround-(b) hope was wrong for CROSS-entity. Would worsen bleed.

C2b_depth_map_subject_keying.finding: Same-relation subject keys most SEPARABLE at L8-12 (cos 0.20-0.42), most COLLINEAR late L24-28 (0.88-0.91). Reproducible across capital AND language relations. Entities converge to shared answer-rep late.

implications.late_band_A4_for_isolation: PRUNED — late layers MORE collinear, not less.
implications.spec_C15_tension: C15 band (L15-25) sits in HIGH-collinearity zone (0.73-0.78) = mechanistically WORST for cross-entity isolation. Tension: 'where edits take' (C15 late) vs 'where keys separate' (mid L8-12). Adds a NEW axis to the CP3 C15-divergence question.
implications.new_lead_band_8_12: Our [4-8] dilutes separable L8 (0.26) with collinear L4-6 (0.68). Band [8-12] (all<0.42) may give cleaner SEQUENTIAL cross-entity isolation. Testable (needs cov L9-12). Root-cause-targeted.
implications.mechanism_evidence: Converts the 'shared relation direction' inference (G6.1 synthesis) into a measured, layer-resolved quantity. Cross-entity bleed proxy = same-relation key collinearity; it is U-shaped in depth.
implications.validity_caveat: key-collinearity -> cross-entity-bleed link is a PLAUSIBLE MECHANISM, not yet causally tested. [4-8] batch is clean at 3B despite L4-6 collinearity (batch absorbs it); the link matters for the SEQUENTIAL/incremental path. A band-[8-12] sequential run vs [4-8] would test it.
